overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing third-person traversal of a futuristic dystopian city on a hover-capable motorcycle. The character rides across industrial rooftops and skyscrapers, performing high-speed jumps between buildings while navigating through dense urban canyons with neon signage and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial petrochemical facility rooftop with ventilation equipment

events.description: accelerating along narrow rooftop path beside large industrial structures
climbing ramp to higher rooftop level, leaving lower industrial area

agents.ego_description: riding futuristic motorcycle along industrial rooftop edges, navigating around ventilation shafts and storage tanks

entered.detail: large cylindrical structure with yellow exhaust plumes emitting from top
cluster of industrial storage containers with weathered yellow paint
massive industrial building with prominent PETROCHEM signage on facade
safety railing along rooftop edge with industrial wear

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an industrial rooftop with the character riding a futuristic motorcycle past ventilation shafts emitting yellow smoke. The camera follows closely as they navigate around equipment and climb to a higher roof level, with the massive PETROCHEM building dominating the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop with highway interchange overlook

events.description: launching off building edge into long aerial jump across gap
landing on distant rooftop with expansive view of highway interchanges and distant mountains

agents.ego_description: accelerating across flat rooftops and executing large jumps between buildings, overlooking highway interchanges below

entered.detail: complex multi-level highway system with moving traffic visible below
hazy mountains visible on horizon beyond city limits
modern reflective glass tower rising above surrounding structures

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto open rooftop surfaces and accelerates toward the edge, launching into a dramatic jump across a wide gap. The camera captures the expansive view of highway interchanges and distant mountains before landing on a distant building, with the PETROCHEM facility now visible far behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon between corporate skyscrapers with waterway below

events.description: entering dense downtown canyon with canal visible between buildings
moving into shadow cast by tall buildings, neon signs becoming visible on facades

agents.ego_description: navigating narrow gaps between skyscrapers and riding along building edges with canal visible far below

entered.detail: greenish water canal running through the city canyon below
towers with illuminated advertising displays and corporate logos
curved elevated road structures connecting to main highways

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle weaves through a dense urban canyon with towering glass skyscrapers on both sides. The character rides along narrow building edges overlooking a green canal below, transitioning from bright sunlight into the shadow of the towers as neon signage becomes visible on the building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate tower rooftop level with holographic advertisements

events.description: approaching building with large DTR signage and entering high-altitude corporate district
passing through massive holographic BODY WITHOUT LIMITS advertisement display

agents.ego_description: performing high-altitude jumps between tallest skyscrapers, passing through holographic billboards and neon signs near the top of the city

entered.detail: large illuminated DTR corporate logo on building facade
floating translucent advertising displays projecting from building sides
massive semi-transparent holographic text display floating between buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place at the highest altitude among the city's tallest towers. The character navigates past the prominent DTR building and jumps through massive holographic advertisements including a BODY WITHOUT LIMITS display. The camera captures the dense futuristic skyline with floating billboards and transparent holographic elements as the motorcycle traverses the upper reaches of the metropolis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a gritty industrial rooftop into the luminous, holographic heights of a futuristic metropolis. It begins on a rooftop amidst ventilation shafts emitting yellow smoke, following the motorcycle as it climbs past the massive Petrochem building. As the rider accelerates toward the edge, the scene opens into a dramatic leap across a wide gap, momentarily revealing expansive highway interchanges and distant mountains before landing on a far building. The camera then descends into a dense urban canyon, weaving along narrow edges above a green canal as the bright sunlight shifts into the deep shadows of towering glass skyscrapers and flickering neon signage. Finally, the trajectory climbs to the city's highest altitude, gliding past the DTR building and through massive holographic advertisements like the Body Without Limits display against a skyline of floating billboards.
